1.name: Oktoberfest Gathering
1.beer_mug_reference: 素材/保拉纳啤酒杯素材/1L 用于啤酒节.png
1.beer_mug_description: a 1-liter transparent glass beer mug (Masskrug) — cylindrical clear glass body with a sturdy handle on the side, Paulaner München branded logo on the glass body, raised decorative patterns, filled with golden beer and thick white foam head
1.environment: Munich Oktoberfest elevated wooden balcony with green cast-iron ornamental railing posts. Four large round circular brand signs on blue-and-white vertical striped poles — LEFT TWO: Paulaner beer brand circular signs with deep navy-blue background, the iconic Paulaner monk/friar figure silhouette in the center, warm tones, classic Bavarian beer branding (do NOT render any text on these signs — logo design only); RIGHT TWO: FC Bayern München circular crest signs with the official Bayern Munich club badge — red outer ring, diagonal blue-and-white diamond/rhombus pattern in the center circle, traditional German football crest (do NOT render any text on these signs — crest design only). LEFT of frame: decorated Christmas tree with ornaments. RIGHT of frame: red-and-white striped carousel. BACKGROUND: classical white stone building with columns, massive bronze Bavaria statue on pedestal. Overcast cloudy daylight, festive Oktoberfest atmosphere.
1.clothing_tag: grey traditional Bavarian Janker jacket, white shirt, and brown Lederhosen leather shorts
1.clothing_minimal: The fan wears a grey traditional Bavarian Janker jacket, white shirt, brown Lederhosen leather shorts, green knee-high socks, and dark shoes.
1.action_minimal: THE FAN stands alone at the wooden balcony railing, facing the camera with a warm confident CLOSED-MOUTH smile. Both hands hold a 1-liter Masskrug beer mug (cylindrical clear glass with handle, Paulaner logo, golden beer, thick white foam) at chest level. The fan is the ONLY person in this image — no other people.
1.clothing_adult: ALL 4 people wear grey traditional Bavarian Janker jackets, white shirts, brown Lederhosen leather shorts, green knee-high socks and dark shoes.
1.action_adult: THIS IMAGE CONTAINS EXACTLY 4 PEOPLE. Count before rendering: [1] player far left, [2] player center-left, [3] THE FAN center, [4] player far right. Total = 4. They stand tightly shoulder-to-shoulder in ONE single row IN FRONT OF the wooden balcony railing. The fan stands at the SAME height as the players. BODY PROPORTION RULE (CRITICAL): ALL 4 people must have REALISTIC NATURAL body proportions — heads are proportional to bodies (head height is approximately 1/7 to 1/8 of total body height). Do NOT make heads oversized or bodies too small. Each person's body from head to waist must be fully visible. Each of the 4 people holds a 1-liter transparent glass beer mug (Masskrug) with handle, raised to chest level. All 4 face the camera with warm confident smiles. ABSOLUTE RULE: There is no 5th person, no extra figure. Only 4 bodies, only 4 faces.

2.environment: FC Bayern Munich inner locker room. Dark blue walls with Paulaner beer brand panel above the lockers — the panel shows the Paulaner brand visual identity: navy blue background with the iconic Paulaner monk/friar figure and brand design in white/gold tones. There is no player name visible on the jerseys. ONE single long wooden bench for the 4 people to sit on. Ambient overhead locker room lights.

2.action_adult:
EXACTLY 4 people sit closely side-by-side on the long wooden bench, feet flat on the ground, ALL FACING THE CAMERA with jersey FRONT clearly visible.

EVERY SINGLE PERSON holds a tall 0.5-liter Paulaner Weissbier glass (tall slender wheat beer glass without handle, golden beer with white foam) in their hand. There are exactly 4 beer glasses in this image — one per person. NO ONE has empty hands. NO ONE is holding a fist instead of a glass. HOW TO HOLD THE GLASS (CRITICAL): Each person holds the beer glass upright with a firm grip — fingers wrapped around the glass body, thumb resting on the side. JERSEY RULE: Every person faces the camera so the jersey FRONT is fully visible — bright red FC Bayern Munich home jersey with white vertical jagged stripes, large white 'T' logo on chest, FC Bayern circular crest badge visible. 4.name: Championship Shower
4.beer_mug_reference: 素材/保拉纳啤酒杯素材/3L啤酒塔 用于啤酒浴.png
4.beer_mug_description: a GIANT 3-liter Paulaner beer tower — an extremely tall cylindrical transparent glass approximately 40-45cm tall (almost as tall as a human torso, MUCH bigger than a normal beer glass), wide cylindrical body with NO handle, thick heavy base, Paulaner brand logo visible on the glass body, filled with 3 liters of golden beer and massive white foam head overflowing the top. This is a MASSIVE oversized novelty glass, NOT a normal-sized beer glass. It is roughly the same height as a person's entire upper body from waist to shoulder.
4.environment: Allianz Arena football pitch at night. Spectacular stadium atmosphere with red illuminated stadium roof and distant empty stands. Dramatic high-contrast night stadium floodlights illuminating the grass. ONLY exactly 4 people on the pitch — nobody else.
4.clothing_tag: the 2025/2026 FC Bayern Munich home outfield kit — bright RED jersey with prominent WHITE vertical zigzag/soundwave jagged stripes running down the front, a LARGE white 'T' logo (T-Mobile sponsor) centered on the chest, and the FC Bayern crest badge on upper-left chest
4.clothing_adult: MANDATORY — ALL 4 people wear the EXACT SAME 2025/2026 FC Bayern Munich home OUTFIELD kit: bright RED jersey with prominent WHITE vertical zigzag/soundwave jagged stripes clearly visible on the front, a LARGE white 'T' logo centered on the chest, FC Bayern circular crest badge on upper-left chest, and red shorts. The jersey MUST show the white zigzag stripes and white T logo — NOT a plain red shirt. This includes Manuel Neuer — he wears the SAME red outfield jersey, NOT a goalkeeper jersey. ABSOLUTELY NO green jersey, NO yellow jersey, NO plain red shirt without stripes, NO different color. Every single person wears the same bright red outfield jersey with white stripes and T logo.
4.action_adult:
EXACTLY 4 ADULTS standing on the pitch. Real football championship celebration — a PLAYER pours beer from a Paulaner glass onto the fan's head.

CAMERA (MANDATORY): PERFECTLY STRAIGHT EYE-LEVEL shot. The camera is positioned at the same height as the subjects' faces — looking completely horizontally straight ahead. The horizon line passes through the faces. NO downward tilt, NO overhead angle, NO bird's eye view, NO elevated perspective. The ground is visible at the bottom of the frame, the sky or stadium at the top.

HEIGHT RULE (CRITICAL): ALL 4 ADULTS stand at THE SAME EYE LEVEL — their heads are aligned horizontally. The fan is a FULL-GROWN ADULT (20-30 years old, approximately 170-175cm tall), standing upright. The fan's shoulders are at the EXACT SAME HEIGHT as the players' shoulders. VISUAL ANCHOR: Draw a horizontal line through their eyes — this same line MUST pass through ALL four people's eyes. Their heads reach the same level. DO NOT render the fan shorter than the players. DO NOT render anyone at a different height.

BODY PROPORTION RULE (CRITICAL): ALL 4 people must have REALISTIC NATURAL body proportions — heads are proportional to bodies (head height is approximately 1/7 to 1/8 of total body height). Do NOT make heads oversized or bodies too small. Full bodies from head to feet must be visible. Each person has a realistic adult body — NOT a cartoon-like big head on a small body.

SPATIAL LAYOUT (CRITICAL): The 4 people stand in a natural group formation on the pitch. THE FAN stands at CENTER foreground, slightly in front. Player A stands DIRECTLY BEHIND the fan — the player's chest faces the fan's back, the player is NOT to the side of the fan. The other TWO players stand BEHIND and FLANKING — one to the left, one to the right, at the same eye level. All 4 people are clearly visible — no one is cut off, no one is hidden behind another. The spatial depth between foreground and background is natural.

CLOTHING (MANDATORY): ALL 4 people wear the IDENTICAL FC Bayern Munich 2025/2026 home outfield kit — bright red jersey with white vertical jagged stripes and a large white 'T' logo on the chest, red shorts. ABSOLUTELY NO green jersey on anyone.

BEER GLASS SIZE AND SHAPE (CRITICAL — FOLLOW EXACTLY):
The beer glass is a GIANT 3-liter Paulaner beer tower — a MASSIVE transparent cylindrical glass approximately 40-45cm tall, almost as tall as a human torso. This is NOT a normal-sized beer glass — it is an oversized novelty tower that requires TWO HANDS to hold. The glass is roughly the same height as the distance from the fan's waist to their shoulder. The glass has NO handle, NO side grip — it is a simple tall smooth cylinder with Paulaner logo. Refer to the beer mug reference image for exact shape and proportions.

POURING ACTION (FOLLOW EXACTLY):
- Player A stands DIRECTLY BEHIND the fan — the player's chest faces the fan's BACK, NOT beside the fan
- CRITICAL NO-CLIP RULE: Player A's body is fully BEHIND the fan. Player A's arms extend FORWARD AND UPWARD over the fan's head. The arms pass OVER the fan's head through open air — NOT through the fan's shoulders or torso. There is ZERO body overlap or arm-through-body clipping. Two clearly SEPARATE bodies: the fan in front, Player A behind.
- Player A holds the beer glass with TWO HANDS — both arms reach forward from behind the fan, holding the glass above the fan's head

- Player A holds the glass with BOTH HANDS raised above the fan's head
- GLASS ANGLE (CRITICAL): The glass is tilted at 45 DEGREES — NOT vertical, NOT upright, NOT straight up. The base of the glass points upward and back; the opening/rim of the glass faces DIAGONALLY DOWNWARD at a 45-degree angle toward the fan's head. This is a clear visible 45° tilt — like pouring from a bottle
- Beer streams OUT from the 45°-tilted glass opening in a smooth arc downward onto the fan's head — the beer exits from the rim of the glass, flows through open air, and splashes onto the fan
- The fan's red jersey becomes visibly wet from the beer on head, shoulders, and upper chest

FAN POSE: THE FAN stands at CENTER, body slightly leaning back, head tilted slightly upward with a CLOSED-MOUTH happy smile. Arms slightly out to the sides. The fan enjoys the celebration. The fan's mouth is CLOSED — NOT open, NOT showing teeth.

BACKGROUND: The other TWO players stand BEHIND the fan — one to the LEFT, one to the RIGHT — flanking the fan and Player A, smiling and watching the celebration. Arms may be raised in celebration or crossed. All 4 bodies are clearly distinct with no body parts merging.

ALL 4 at the SAME eye-level height. Golden beer arc catches stadium floodlights as liquid cascades from above.
